info.name: Aura AI — Complete API Collection v2.0.0
info.description:
Complete unified Postman collection for the Aura AI EGX Stock Market backend (v2.0.0).

🚀 HOW TO USE:
1. Import this file into Postman.
2. Run '🔐 Users > Login' — the token is auto-saved to {{token}}.
3. After creating an automation, copy its `id` into the {{automationId}} collection variable.
4. All protected routes use {{token}} automatically.

📌 Collection Variables:
- baseUrl  → http://localhost:3000
- token    → auto-set by Login / OAuth
- automationId → set manually after creating an automation

variable.description: Auto-set by Login or OAuth requests.
Set this after creating an automation.

exec: // Collection-level test: verify Content-Type on all responses.

response.name: 201 Created — Success
400 — Terms not accepted
400 — Email already registered

exec: console.warn('⚠️ Login failed or no token returned. Check credentials.');

response.name: 200 OK — Success
401 — Wrong password
401 — User not found

exec: console.warn('⚠️ OAuth login failed or no token returned.');

query.description: Search term (symbol, EN name, or AR name)
